summary: Feature Toggles & Subscription System Testing Complete - All core features verified. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified including Super Admin subscription management, feature toggles, therapist sidebar filtering, assistant unified calendar, and assessment trend chart integration.
seed_data_creation: Test subscription plans created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature toggles system fully tested. Super Admin can manage subscription plans with feature toggles. Therapist sidebar correctly filters nav items based on enabled features. Assistant dashboard uses unified TherapistSchedule component. Assessment trend chart shows in ClientProfileView when client has 2+ completed assessments.

therapist_nav_items_with_features_enable.notes: All nav items visible when features enabled: Dashboard, Clients, Schedule, Session Notes, Assessments, Protocols, AI Clinical, Availability, Recurring, Messages, Payments, Assistants

super_admin_subscription_plans_managemen.notes: Super Admin can list, create, and manage subscription plans with feature toggles

super_admin_feature_toggles_ui.notes: Feature Toggles dialog shows all 8 features with toggle switches: session_notes, assessments, ai_clinical, protocols, messaging, payments, assistants, reports

feature_protected_endpoints_403.notes: Backend endpoints return 403 when feature is disabled for therapist's plan

therapist_sidebar_feature_filtering.notes: TherapistDashboard filters nav items based on feature toggles from SubscriptionContext

assistant_unified_calendar.notes: AssistantDashboard uses TherapistSchedule component for unified calendar view

assistant_schedule_access.notes: Assistant can view appointments, book appointments, block time. Cannot modify availability settings.

assistant_restricted_nav.notes: Availability and Recurring nav items correctly hidden for assistants

assessment_trend_chart_integration.notes: AssessmentTrendChart component integrated in ClientProfileView Assessments tab. Shows when client has 2+ completed assessments.

subscription_expiry_warning_banner.notes: Expiry warning banner logic implemented - shows when days_remaining <= 7 and > 0

subscription_status_endpoint.notes: GET /api/auth/subscription-status returns is_read_only, subscription_status, feature_toggles, days_remaining, expiry_warning
